entry.title: When Post Goods Issue skip COGS split items with condition
entry.content:
Hello,

I have to deactivate the COGS split if the item has a condition = 'X'  when we Post Goods Issue, but I cannot find where I can do it, if it's a customizing matter or I have to do some BADI or Enhancement...

Do you know somehow?

entry.title: External Loans Given - Setup Errors
entry.content: Hello experts - Our Treasury team has set up external loans given (33A) in the SAP ECC Treasury module.  One is a 4-year USD contract with repayment type of annuity with set monthly payments (interest based on prior months principal balance/remainder applied to principal).  They could create the contract on QA but were not able to see the split between interest and principal, so they attempted to post the initial disbursement and received this error.   Do you know what config we are missing?

entry.title: OBXL setting- payment small differences are posted with Tax line/tax code
entry.content:
Dear team, we are facing a challenge in posting the small customer payment differences to specified GL account maintained in tcode OBXL. The issue is when we post customer payment(F-28) the small difference which is under tolerance getting posted by tax code hence posting is generating separate tax line for small difference. 

The same testing I have performed in client. But in this client the customer payment posting is not calculating tax and hence not generating separate tax line.

The requirement is that we do not want to calculate tax on small differences amount and if possible, want to use default tax code for small differences.

I have also checked the GL setting under control data (FS00) for both clients. The setting is same, and the used tax code is tax applicable

entry.title: Compatibility Packs for Simple Finance
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are running S4HANA 2021, and everything is on premise. I understand that we need certain Compatibility Packs, so that the New Statutory Reports are and Cloud Applications are available to us as opposed to the old ones we are using. 

Is there a step-by-step documentation on how to achieve this?

Thanks

entry.title: How increase the length of bank account number for Indian client.
entry.content: Business requirement is like that they want increase length of Bank account no. when I'm check in the system  OY17 transaction there I saw bank account no length is 15 but at the time of enter the account no in BP system take 18 digit no length. so how to increase bank account no length in sap.

entry.title: badi's or enhancements for aibu.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

requirement: custom fields in as02, as03 should retain data.

Firstly, There are enhancements done in as01,02,03 to add custom fields. after settlement in ko88 these custom fields doesn't retain data (not an issue with screen rendering, data in the ANLA table itself is disappearing). so the previous team has done explicit enhancements(getting the data before settlement process and filling the data back in the ANLA table after process completion) in ko88, after that custom fields retain data. 

but after AIAB settlement (precisely after aibu) again, the data of custom fields in as02, as03 disappear for both the assets involved.

so, I am looking for badi's or any type of enhancements in  AIBU that will solve my issue.

I have already tried BADI_FIAA_DOCLINES. But the custom fields in as02,03 doesn't retain its data even after implementing this badi.

if I want to go for explicit enhancement which include can I use?

( my first time doing standard enhancement) 

Thanks,

Harshitha.

entry.title: How to configure EPIC – Payment Management and Bank-Enterprise Integration?
entry.content:
How to configure EPIC – Payment Management and Bank-Enterprise Integration?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Alternative for Advanced Financial Closing
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a non-BTP alternative of Advanced Financial Cockpit? I noticed that Advanced Financial cockpit incurs a very high cost, and as per the below note, since the mentioned Business Functions are active for us, it looks like the only solution, and classical Closing Cockpit cannot be used. However, Our usage is not so much so as to benefit from so high a cost.

2547 - S4TWL - Closing Cockpit with S/4HANA OP 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: “Archiving” of the transaction S_ALR_87012089
entry.content:
Hello, 3 months ago, we did an “Archiving” of the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
Note 2353160 indicates that this data can be seen with the SARI transaction.
We need to know how to identify these cases in the SARI transaction.We need to identify how to view the information in “Archiving” with the transaction SARI for the documents of the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
When we view the data of the Object CHANGEDOCU, many modifications appear of all the transactions.Please, we need to identify those that correspond to the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
Can you help us?

entry.title: What is should be the set up process for multi currency in SAP for AP and Payments?
entry.content:
Pertaining to suppliers in Mexico, where account vs CLABE payments would be performed out of a MXN or USD account, is it dependent to the currency of what AP processes supplier invoice, Vendor Master config for bank info, F110 o F-53 for payments?

How can the following expectation be managed?

1. Prevent system from paying MXN and USD currencies as USD or MXN?

2. Ensure when payment run is performed segregating document by currency and based on the Vendor banking info, weather is considered ACCOUNT VS CLABE

3. How can a payment be issued from a single AB or Vendor # where documents posted on the subledger are mixed currencies?

entry.title: Change new formulation new tax base
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently our government changes formulation for tax base value.

Previous formulation was 100% from base value, but in 2025 formulation changed to (11/12) x base value. Please give us a solution for this requirement.

Dr. 01.   AR Customer     1,110,000
Cr. 50      Revenue          916,667 (=11/12*1.000.000)
Cr. 50      AP VAT Out     110,000 (Rate 12%)


Regards,

Ruben

entry.title: DRFF - Operator "Contains" missing for House bank master data object
entry.content:
Transaction - DRFF

DRFF - Operator "Contains" available for BAM Master Data. 

DRFF - Operator "Contains" missing for House bank master data object. 

Please find the attached for more information.

entry.title: PS WBS Settings
entry.content:
Dear PS Experts,

I have a non-statistical project. Some of the WBSs defined under it are statistical and some are not. This is wrong. As you know, I cannot make this change for the current project/wbs.

When I want to create a new WBS in project, the statistical tick is automatically ticked and does not allow me to change it. I want to change it myself.

I wait help!

entry.title: Is it possible to generate a customer clearing document without items in transaction FB05?
entry.content: We have a backlog of customer PA's and we are using the 'POSTING_INTERFACE_CLEARING' Fm for mass clearing, however, I would like to know if there is any customization so that the generated documents do not create items, since we do not have difference postings.

entry.title: Existing RFC for Process Director, particularly for accessing data related to the /cockpit/1 t-code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Existing RFC /Odata for Process Director, particularly for accessing data related to the /cockpit/1 transaction in SAP. Specifically, we’re looking to retrieve workcycle data, company code, vendor code details using the Process Director Document Number.

entry.title: User-exit to redetermine Collection Group in SD-Billing
entry.content:
Hi expert:

 

I understand that we can set up “Collection Group” in customer master.

 

Any user-exit that can redetermine collection group when we generated SD-billing that we create FI document to AR?

entry.title: No entry in FAGLFLEXA for this line item of BSEG (Ledger )
entry.content:
Hello,
I have runned the FIN_CORR_RECONCILE program before ECC-S4HANA conversion. Then I get "No entry in FAGLFLEXA for this line item of BSEG (Ledger )" error in FIN_CORR_DISPLAY. I checked related note 2714344 with this FINS_RECON 072 error message. 
Could anyone explain, what does this message means? What should I check? Will this error cause problems after conversion?

Regards.

entry.title: query on purchase of exam attempt
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

Good day i could not able to purchase exam attempt from india and raised ticket with SAP team on same.

they replied saying buying via cart has been stopped and need to make only NEFT payment.

they provided with bank details but there is no account number in it. can someone reply if purchased attempt how you did so useful for many people here strugggling for solution.

entry.title: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content:
Hello all, 

We have a requirement to change the company from XYZ to ABC. In real time scenarios does SAP system allows us to change the company code from one to another. If yes, what would be strategy to do it without effecting or impacting the master data and transactional data. 

Here in our we do not have any transactional data posted to this company code. 

can anyone help me with the issue 

Thank you

entry.title: TRQ: Register_Load_date
entry.content:
Hi Everybody!

Hope you're doing great,

I have a question and hope someone can help me,

I was trying to settle an investment operation in FTR_Edit, for product class 04R, and operation type "sale". When I save the operation (to settle it), I get the following error message:

TRQ: Register_Load_Date

TRQ 0081

 

 

What could it be? I know there's a SAP note (2218473 - FTR_EDIT Message TRQ0 081 Internal error in TRQ). All the conditions match, except that this case is 04R, while the one in the note is 042.

Do you know where could be the issue? all configurations are ok
